meaning: Junior Common (或Combination)Room <英>(大学)学生公用室
examples: Documents and Web content are stored in the JCR.
It requires a single child node, called JCR: content.
JCR: a set of interfaces conforming to the JSR-170 specification.
St Hilda's Junior Common Room (JCR) passed a motion demanding the librarian is reinstated.
St Hilda's Junior Common Room (JCR) has already passed a motion demanding the librarian is reinstated.
